RESPONSE TO MO TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION AND FOR IMPOSITION OF MONETARY P&A

LAW AND MOTION 301, FOR ENFORCEMENT OF SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CAL. CODE CIV. PROC 664.6 AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. A SEALED COPY OF THE AGREEMENT WAS DELIVERED TO THE COURT. THE COURT FOUND THAT THE PRODUCTION OF THE DOCUMENT WAS COMPELLED BY THE COURT AND DID NOT VIOLATE THE CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ENFORCEMENT OF SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 AND ALLOWED ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,500. THE SEALED COPY OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WAS ORDERED RETURNED TO COUNSEL. (JJM/MD) REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR # 7855

calendar.matters:
For Enforcement Of Settlement Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc 664.6 And For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven L. Robinson, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF JOSEPH L. ALIOTO AND ANGELA ALIOTO 415-434-8700 appeared on behalf of plaintiffs and moving parties Jesus Yamo, et al.

*A sealed copy of the agreement was delivered to the Court. The Court found that the production of the document was compelled by the Court and did not violate the confidentiality agreement of the parties. The Court granted Plaintiffs' Motion for enforcement of Settlement pursuant to CCP 664.6 and allowed attorney fees in the amount of $3,500. The sealed copy of the settlement agreement was ordered returned to counsel. (JJM/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
